jd_text: 🚀 Associate Director – Data Platform & Operations *** Must have healthcare/healthtech experience *** My client is seeking a senior leader to drive the strategy, delivery, and operations of a hybrid enterprise data platform powering AI, BI, and analytics. This role blends technical leadership + hands-on execution , ensuring platforms are scalable, secure, and self-service enabled. 🔧 Key Responsibilities Lead architecture & operations across Azure, Kubernetes/OpenShift & on-prem storage Drive CI/CD, IaC (Terraform/Ansible) & platform automation Oversee big data ecosystem (Spark, Kafka, Delta Lake, SingleStore) Implement observability (monitoring, logging, lineage, alerts) Own platform reliability, scalability & cost optimisation (FinOps) Enable self-service for Data, AI & BI teams Manage delivery, dependencies & production readiness Mentor teams and embed DevOps/DataOps best practices ⚙️ Platform Stack Azure • Kubernetes/OpenShift • Spark • Kafka • Delta Lake • Parquet • SingleStore • VAST • Azure DevOps 👥 Leadership & Impact Partner with CTO, CDO & AI leadership on platform strategy Own roadmap delivery, performance metrics & cost reporting Lead and grow platform, DevOps & operations teams Drive modernisation & cloud-native adoption ✅ Requirements 8+ years in platform engineering / DevOps / data infrastructure 4+ years in leadership roles Strong hands-on experience with Kubernetes, CI/CD & IaC Expertise in big data platforms (Spark, Kafka, Delta Lake) Experience in hybrid cloud & on-prem environments Strong understanding of observability, self-service platforms & performance tuning 🎓 Education & Certifications Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field Preferred: Kubernetes (CKA/CKAD), Azure DevOps, or cloud certifications *** Only successful candidates will be contacted ***
